content: Payment gateway connection timeouts after SDK upgrade. The payment SDK 4.x changed the default connection timeout from 60s to 30s, causing test_payment_capture to fail with ConnectionTimeout to payments-gateway. Resolution: set PAYMENTS_HTTP_TIMEOUT=60 explicitly and pin the SDK minor version. Runbook: docs/runbooks/payments-timeout.md

Flaky integration tests due to shared database state. Parallel CI jobs hit the same Postgres schema and race on fixtures. Resolution: give each CI job an isolated schema via a per-job search_path. Runbook: docs/runbooks/ci-db-isolation.md

Staging deploy regression: invoice schema migration added a NOT NULL tax_region column without a default, so the db-migrate job failed on existing rows. Resolution: backfill tax_region then add the constraint in a second migration. Runbook: docs/runbooks/safe-migrations.md

Pull request stalled in review for 9 days blocking a security patch. The reviewer was on call and missed the request. Resolution: add a stale-PR Slack reminder after 48h and a CODEOWNERS backup reviewer. Runbook: docs/runbooks/pr-sla.md

Memory leak after deploy of the checkout-service caused OOM kills every 4 hours. A new in-memory cache had no eviction policy. Resolution: cap the cache with an LRU max size and add a memory alert at 80%. Runbook: docs/runbooks/oom-checkout.md

Docker build failing with 'no space left on device' on CI runners. Build cache layers accumulated across jobs. Resolution: prune the builder cache nightly and add a disk-usage healthcheck to runners. Runbook: docs/runbooks/runner-disk.md

API latency spike after enabling a new feature flag that triggered an N+1 query on the orders endpoint. Resolution: eager-load order line items and add a query-count assertion to the perf test. Runbook: docs/runbooks/n-plus-one.md

Webhook duplicate deliveries from GitHub caused duplicate incidents before idempotency was added. GitHub retries on slow 2xx responses. Resolution: dedupe on the X-GitHub-Delivery id (planned for V2 correlation). Runbook: docs/runbooks/webhook-idempotency.md

Merge conflict storm: a long-lived release branch diverged from main over three weeks, making every PR conflict. Resolution: enforce a 5-day branch-age limit and rebase nightly. Runbook: docs/runbooks/branch-hygiene.md

GitLab pipeline reported success while a deploy job was actually skipped due to a rules:if misconfiguration, hiding a failed release. Resolution: treat skipped required jobs as failures in the pipeline gate. Runbook: docs/runbooks/pipeline-gates.md
